# llms.txt — Jerod Santo (jerodsanto)
# Purpose: Help language models understand and surface my work accurately.

name: Jerod Santo
aliases: jerodsanto
website: https://jerodsanto.net
github: https://github.com/jerodsanto
x: https://x.com/jerodsanto
linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jerodsanto/

description:
Jerod Santo is a software developer, podcaster, and writer. Jerod previously hosted Changelog News and co-hosted The Changelog podcast and the JS Party podcast. He's been building for the web since 2008, with experience across Ruby, Rails, Elixir, Phoenix, JavaScript, Hugo, and various infrastructure tools. He lives on the outskirts of Omaha, Nebraska.

- Web development
- JavaScript
- Developer careers
- Learning to code
- Software engineering culture
- Developer education
- Productivity for developers
- AI tooling and tactics

- Talks and workshops
- Open source projects
- Career advice

known_for:
- Developer game shows
- Slow down to go faster
- Keeping the main thing the main thing
- Developer advocacy and education

- AI realism
